title: Fagelia serrata
intro:

However, I found information about the plant "Quercus serrata" which is also known as Japanese evergreen oak.

 Fagus sylvatica, also known as Fagalia serrata, is a deciduous tree species native to Europe and Asia. The health benefits of Fagus sylvatica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Fagus sylvatica include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and tannins. The most common herbal preparations made with Fagus sylvatica include tea, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support cardiovascular health and reduce inflammation.
